title: Fix local procedure dispatch state
description:
As a dashboard user, I want procedure runs launched locally through MCP/Tactus tools to display as Local from first render through realtime updates, so that local work is not misrepresented as dispatcher Announced or Claimed state.

Feature: Local procedure dispatch state
Scenario: Tool-launched local procedure task is displayed as local
Given a procedure run is launched from the local MCP/Tactus tool path
When the task is created, updated, heartbeating, failed, or completed
Then task metadata includes dispatch_mode local and the dashboard displays Local instead of Announced or Claimed.

Definition of Done:
- Producer writes dispatch_mode local for direct local procedure runs.
- Local task updates preserve dispatch_mode and avoid workerNodeId.
- Dashboard trusts dispatch_mode as the authority.
- Existing malformed recent tasks can be repaired without permanent broad fallback logic.
- Targeted Python and dashboard tests pass.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation from the approved plan. I will isolate changes in the PR worktree and keep unrelated local checkout changes out of staging.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented local procedure dispatch-state fix in working tree. Producer changes: MCP procedure subprocesses set PLEXUS_LOCAL_DISPATCH=1; ProcedureService can create local tasks with dispatch_mode=local and PENDING dispatch status; shared runner preserves dispatch_mode=local and clears workerNodeId for local lifecycle updates. Dashboard changes: ProcedureTask treats dispatch_mode as display authority, no-task state renders Pending, and nested TaskStatus pre-execution rows are suppressed for ProcedureTask. Added repair utility and repaired live tasks d90b6e36-1d24-4b26-bd39-a3f091ef8814 and 91cd1837-ab38-4534-beac-b47f43821741. Verification: pytest plexus/cli/shared/test_experiment_runner.py -q passed; dashboard ProcedureTask/TaskStatus Jest tests passed; dashboard npm run typecheck passed. MCP tactus procedure subset still has pre-existing failures around handle child budget expectations unrelated to this dispatch-state fix.
